overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through rural countryside. The journey transitions from open grassland with an abandoned wooden structure through a path intersection and into a dense forest with rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with abandoned wooden structure

events.description: mist becomes visible in the distant valley ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wide dirt path through open countryside, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden structure with broken walls in the grassland
gnarled leafless tree with twisted branches
broad dirt trail with patches of grass and gravel
tall grass with orange and green hues covering the landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through open grassland under a partly cloudy sky. An abandoned wooden hut and large dead tree stand to the left while the path stretches ahead toward distant misty valleys. The environment is bright and exposed with natural sunlight.

events.description: approaching path intersection with multiple route options
weathered wooden fence appears running parallel to the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking, taking the right fork at the path intersection toward denser vegetation

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts with wire running along the path edge
dirt path junction where the trail splits into multiple directions

segments.scene_description: The path leads to an intersection where Geralt takes the right fork. A wooden fence appears on the left side as the landscape transitions toward forested areas. The abandoned hut and dead tree fall behind as the journey continues through transitional grassland.

events.description: entering denser forest area with rocky outcroppings visible on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the narrowing path as trees close in from both sides and shadows lengthen

entered.detail: gray stone rocks and boulders emerging from the grassy slope
thick forest canopy beginning to cover the path creating dappled shade

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a forested area with dense vegetation on both sides. A wooden fence runs close by on the left while rocky outcroppings appear on the right. The canopy begins to close overhead, creating a more enclosed and shaded environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with rocky trail

events.description: path becomes significantly more shaded as dense canopy blocks direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating the winding rocky trail through the deep forest, moving into denser shade

entered.detail: large mature tree trunks flanking both sides of the narrow path creating an enclosed corridor
dense bushes and ferns filling the spaces between trees on both sides

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through the deep forest interior, becoming rocky and uneven. Thick tree trunks and dense undergrowth flank the path while the wooden fence disappears behind. The canopy creates deep shade with only dappled sunlight reaching the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a bright, open grassland gradually transforms into a dense, shaded forest. It begins with Geralt walking past an abandoned wooden hut and a large dead tree under a partly cloudy sky, with the path stretching toward distant misty valleys. As the journey continues, the camera follows him through a path intersection toward the right, leaving the open plains behind as a wooden fence appears and the landscape shifts toward wooded terrain. The scene then closes in as the trail enters a forested area where rocky outcroppings emerge and the overhead canopy begins to block the sunlight. Finally, the path winds deeper into the forest interior, becoming rocky and uneven while the fence disappears behind thick tree trunks and dense undergrowth under a canopy of deep shade.
